title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
